---
title: "4. Exploratory Phenotype analysis"
author: "sss322"
date: "2025-04-09"
output: html_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE)
```

## **Import packages and data**
```{r, message=FALSE}
pkgs <- c("dplyr","tidyr","readr","readxl","lubridate","stringr", "ggplot2", "forcats", "ASRtriala", "openxlsx")
suppressPackageStartupMessages(invisible(lapply(pkgs, require, character.only = TRUE)))

base_path <- if (.Platform$OS.type == "windows") {
  "C:/Users/Siim Sepp/NY_WMB"
} else {
  "~/Documents/GitHub/NY_WMB"
}

load(file.path(base_path, "data/data_ag.Rdata"))
load(file.path(base_path, "data/data_mq.Rdata"))
load(file.path(base_path, "data/data_sp.Rdata"))
Sys.setenv(LANGUAGE = "en")
```




# **1. Calc HD, GDD and sowing date**

```{r}
#long VI table if you need downstream
traits <- names(data_sp)[5:13]
data_sp_long <- tidyr::pivot_longer(data_sp, all_of(traits), names_to="trait", values_to="value")

# sowing dates → map to Env and Year (Oct sowing → next spring season)
sow_map <- tibble::tibble(
  Environment = c("KET21","SNY22","MCG23","HELF24","MCG25"),
  sd          = as.Date(c("2020-10-08","2021-10-11","2022-10-11","2023-10-03","2024-09-27"))
) %>%
  mutate(Year = year(sd) + 1)

# flights (ensure Date parsed, strip trailing " UTC" if present)
flight_d <- readxl::read_excel("data/Flights/flightdate.xlsx") %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(str_remove(as.character(Date), " UTC$")))

# attach sowing dates and compute days-from-sowing (JDD) and from Jan 1 (JDD1)
JD_map <- flight_d %>%
  left_join(sow_map, by = "Year") %>%
  mutate(
    JDD  = as.integer(Date - sd),
    JDD1 = as.integer(Date - as.Date(paste0(Year, "-01-01")))
  )

# weather → daily mean temp and cumulative GDD per year
base_temp <- 40
weather <- readr::read_csv("data/weather_dataq_ithaca.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    DATE    = as.Date(DATE),
    year    = year(DATE),
    t_avg   = (TMAX + TMIN) / 2,
    gdd_day = pmax(t_avg - base_temp, 0)
  ) %>%
  arrange(year, DATE) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  mutate(GDD_cum = cumsum(gdd_day)) %>%
  ungroup()

# GDD on flight dates: join cumulative GDD by exact date & year
JD_map <- JD_map %>%
  left_join(weather %>% transmute(Year = year, Date = DATE, GDD = GDD_cum),
            by = c("Year","Date"))

# average HD_JD per year (use Env→Year map so it matches sow_map)
year_map <- sow_map %>% dplyr::select(Env = Environment, Year)
data_ag  <- data_ag %>% mutate(Env = as.character(Env)) %>% left_join(year_map, by = "Env")

avg_HD_by_year <- data_ag %>%
  group_by(Year) %>%
  summarise(mean_HD_JD = mean(HD_JD, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(JD_date = as.Date(paste0(Year, "-01-01")) + mean_HD_JD)

# GDD at the mean heading date (vectorized join to weather)
avg_HD_by_year <- avg_HD_by_year %>%
  left_join(weather %>% transmute(Year = year, JD_date = DATE, GDD_JD = GDD_cum),
            by = c("Year","JD_date"))

# merge heading-date info to flight map and compute distance from HD
JD_map <- JD_map %>%
  left_join(avg_HD_by_year, by = "Year") %>%
  mutate(d_f_HD = as.integer(Date - JD_date))

save(JD_map, file= "data/JDmap.Rdata")
```

```{r}
weather <- weather %>% #filter(!year == "2020") 
  mutate( year = year(DATE),doy = yday(DATE), month = month(DATE) ) 

weather_filtered <- weather %>% filter(month(DATE) <= 6) %>% filter(month(DATE) > 3) %>% 
  mutate( year = year(DATE), month_day = as.Date(format(DATE, "2000-%m-%d")))


JD_map_filtered <- JD_map %>% filter(month(Date) <= 6) %>% filter(month(Date) > 3) %>% 
  mutate( year = year(Date), month_day = as.Date(format(Date, "2000-%m-%d")), 
          JD_date_norm = as.Date(format(JD_date, "2000-%m-%d") ))
```


```{r}
# GDD and flight timepoint GDD. 

JD_map_filtered[,1:2]

ggplot(weather_filtered, aes(x = month_day, y = GDD_cum)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkgreen", size= 1) +
  geom_vline(data = JD_map_filtered, aes(xintercept = month_day), 
             color = "red", linetype = "dashed",size= 1) +
   geom_vline(data = JD_map_filtered, aes(xintercept = JD_date_norm), 
             color = "black",size= 1) +
  facet_grid(rows= vars(year))+
  scale_x_date(
    date_labels = "%b%d", date_breaks = "1 week",
    limits = as.Date(c("2000-04-15", "2000-06-30"))
  ) +
  labs(
   # title = "Cumulative GDD by Year with Flight Dates",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Cumulative GDD"
  ) +
  #theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 24),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text = element_text(size=12), 
    axis.title = element_text(size=14))


```




# **2. Plotting the distribution of traits**


### *Plotting the agronomic and the MQ traits*


```{r}
colnames(data_ag)
colnames(data_ag)[9]<- "WS"
colnames(data_mq)
dag<- data_ag[,c(1:3,7,8,9)]

dmq<- data_mq[,c(2,4:15)]
damq<- left_join(dag, dmq, by= "plot_id")

traits<- colnames(damq)[c(-1,-2, -3)]
damq$Alpha.amylase.20.DU. <- as.double(damq$Alpha.amylase.20.DU.) 
damql<- damq  %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(traits),
    names_to = "trait",
    values_to = "value"
  )

env_order<- c( "KET21", "SNY22" ,"MCG23","HELF24" , "MCG25" )
trait_map <- c(
  "KernelWeight.mg." = "KW",
  "on6.64...."       = "on6/64", 
  "MaltExtract..."   = "ME",
  "BarleyProtein..." = "BP",
  "WortProtein..."   = "WP",
  "S.T"              = "S.T", 
  "DP..ASBC."       = "DP", 
  "Alpha.amylase.20.DU." = "AA", 
  "Beta.glucan.ppm." = "BG",
  "HD_JD" = "HD", 
  "yield_kgha" = "GY", 
  "FAN.ppm."         = "FAN", 
  "AdjunctQualityScore" = "Adj.Sc",
  "All_MaltQualityScore" = "All.Sc")



pal <- c(
  KET21  = "cornsilk3",
  SNY22  = "palegreen2",
  MCG23  = "wheat2",
  HELF24 = "lightblue3", 
  MCG25 = "yellow3"
)
library(RColorBrewer)
base_pal <- brewer.pal(12, "Set3")
extra_pal <- brewer.pal(8, "Dark2")
pal_combined <- c(base_pal, extra_pal)


trait_order<- c( "GY" , "HD", "WS",  "KW", "on6/64" , "FAN" , "DP", "AA", "S.T" , "BG" , "ME",  "BP", "WP", "Adj.Sc", "All.Sc" )

colnames(damql)[c(3,4)] <- c("Environment", "Trait")
damql <- damql %>%
  mutate(Trait = recode(Trait, !!!trait_map))

damql <- damql %>%  mutate( Environment = trimws(as.character(Environment)),
    Environment = fct_relevel(Environment, env_order)  
  ) %>% mutate( Trait= trimws(as.character(Trait)),
    Trait = fct_relevel(Trait, trait_order)  
  )


p <- ggplot(damql, aes(x = value,  fill = Environment)) +
    geom_density(alpha= 0.5,adjust = 1.5) +
   scale_fill_manual(values = pal_combined) +
  #scale_fill_manual(values= pal, drop= FALSE)+
    facet_wrap(~Trait,  scales = "free", ncol=5, nrow=3) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))+
  ylab("Density") +
  xlab("")

p


p <- ggplot(damql, aes(y = value,  fill = Environment)) +
    geom_boxplot(alpha= 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values= pal_combined, drop= FALSE)+
    facet_wrap(~Trait,  scales = "free", ncol=5, nrow=3) +
    theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))+
  ylab("Density") +
  xlab("")

p
```


### *Plotting the spectral traits*
```{r}

colnames(JD_map)[6]<- "Env"
colnames(JD_map)[c(2,3, 5,6,10)]
###########################################################################################
data_sp_long <- left_join(data_sp_long, JD_map[c(2,3, 5,6,10)], by = c("Env" ,"Timepoint" ))
###########################################################################################
table(data_sp_long$Env, data_sp_long$Timepoint, data_sp_long$trait)

data_sub <- data_sp_long %>% filter(DAS >150) %>% filter(!trait == "GDVI") %>% filter(trait %in% c("NDVI", "PSRI"))

data_sub1 <- data_sub %>%  mutate( Environment = trimws(as.character(Env)),
    Environment = fct_relevel(Environment, env_order)  
  ) %>% mutate( Trait= trimws(as.character(trait)),
    Trait = fct_relevel(Trait, trait_order)  
  )


#Smooth plot GDD VI
p <- ggplot(data_sub1, aes(x = GDD, y = value, color = Environment)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "gam", formula = y ~ s(x, k = 4), se = FALSE, linewidth = 2, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = pal_combined, drop = FALSE)+
  facet_wrap(~trait,  scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    #title = paste("Smooth VI-s over locations"),
    x = "GDD",                         
    y = "Value",
    fill = "Trait")+
    #color = "Trait") +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 22, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16), 
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

print(p)

#Smooth plot date VI
data_sub2 <- data_sub1 %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Date = as.Date(sprintf("2000-%02d-%02d",
                                       lubridate::month(Date),
                                       lubridate::day(Date))))

p <- ggplot(data_sub2, aes(x = Date, y = value, color = Environment)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "gam", formula = y ~ s(x, k = 4), se = FALSE, linewidth = 2, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = pal_combined, drop = FALSE)+
  facet_wrap(~trait,  scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    #title = paste("Smooth VI-s over locations"),
    x = "Date",                         
    y = "Value",
    fill = "Trait")+
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 22, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16), 
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )
Sys.setenv(LANGUAGE = "en")
p
```




### *Plotting the histograms PC and FPC scores*
```{r}
load("data/F_PCA_scoresG.Rdata")
F_PC_scores<- FPCA_scores_df
colnames(F_PC_scores)

# Assuming your dataframe is called df_pcs
F_PC_long <- F_PC_scores %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = contains("PC"),
    names_to = "Component",
    values_to = "Loadings")

colnames(F_PC_long)
colnames(data_ag)
df_ag <- left_join(F_PC_long, data_ag[,-3], by= c("plot_id"))
df_mq <- left_join(F_PC_long, data_mq[,-3], by= c("plot_id"))
```


```{r}
df_ag<- df_ag %>% arrange(Env)

df_ag1 <- df_ag %>% filter(Component %in% c( "FPC1"  ,"FPC2", "FPC3")) %>% mutate( Env = fct_relevel(Env, env_order))

p <- ggplot(df_ag1, aes(x = Loadings, fill = Env)) +
    geom_density(alpha = 0.3, adjust = 1.5) +
    facet_wrap(~Component, scales= "free") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal_combined, drop = FALSE) +

    #theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 22, face = "bold"),
     axis.text = element_text(size = 16),     
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16), 
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16), 
    legend.position = "bottom")+
  ggtitle("") +
  ylab("Density") +
  xlab("")

print(p)
```




# **3. Calculating Summary Statistics, CV and overlap**
```{r}
#yield
data_ag$GID<- as.factor(data_ag$GID)
sumst_ag <- audit.met(data_ag, gen= "GID",resp= "yield_kgha", trial= "Env")
print(sumst_ag)

#WS
sumst_ws <- audit.met(data_ag, gen= "GID",resp= "WS", trial= "Env")
print(sumst_ws)

#HD
sumst_hd <- audit.met(data_ag, gen= "GID",resp= "HD_JD", trial= "Env")
print(sumst_hd)


#Malting quality
traits<- colnames(data_mq)[4:15]
data_mq$GID<- as.factor(data_mq$GID)
data_mq$Alpha.amylase.20.DU <- as.numeric(data_mq$Alpha.amylase.20.DU.)


MQstats<- list()
for (tr in traits){
  MQstats[tr]<- audit.met(data_mq, gen= "GID",resp= tr, trial= "Env")
}

dmq<- data_mq %>%
  select(4:15) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "Trait", values_to = "Value") %>%
  group_by(Trait) %>%
  summarise(
    mean  = mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    min   = min(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    max   = max(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    var   = var(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd    = sd(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    range = max - min,
    cv    = sd / mean*100
  ) %>% arrange(cv)

#Spectral data
p <- ggplot(data_sp, aes(y = PSRI, group = Timepoint)) +
      geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.2) +
      facet_wrap(~ Env) +
      labs(
        title = paste("Timepoint:", "| VI:", ~Env) ) +
      #theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
      )
    
print(p)

boxplot(data_sp$NDVI ~data_sp$Env)
```
